name: Agent 13
ability: On Reveal: Add a random card to your hand.

name: Bucky Barnes
ability: When this is destroyed, create the Winter Soldier in its place.

name: Cloak
ability: On Reveal: Next turn, both players can move cards to this location.

name: Ebony Maw
ability: You can’t play this after turn 3. Ongoing: You can’t play cards here.

name: Hobgoblin
ability: On Reveal: Your opponent gains control of this.

name: Iceman
ability: On Reveal: Give a random card in your opponent’s hand +1 Cost. (maximum 6)

name: Jubilee
ability: On Reveal: Add a card from your deck to this location.

name: Killmonger
ability: On Reveal: Destroy ALL 1-Cost cards.

name: Leech
ability: On Reveal: Remove the abilities from all cards in your opponent’s hand.

name: Morbius
ability: Ongoing: +2 Power for each time you discarded a card this game.

name: Nakia
ability: On Reveal: Give the 2 leftmost cards in your hand +2 Power.

name: Okoye
ability: On Reveal: Give every card in your deck +1 Power.

name: Rhino
ability: On Reveal: Ruin this location. (remove its ability)

name: Sabretooth
ability: When this is destroyed, return it to your hand. It costs 0.

name: Sandman
ability: Ongoing: Players can only play 1 card a turn.

name: Scorpion
ability: On Reveal: Afflict cards in your opponent’s hand with -1 Power.

name: Shang-Chi
ability: On Reveal: Destroy all enemy cards at this location that have 9 or more Power.

name: Storm
ability: On Reveal: Flood this location. Next turn is the last turn cards can be played here.

name: Sunspot
ability: At the end of each turn, gain +1 Power for each unspent Energy.

name: Swarm
ability: When this is discarded from your hand, add two copies that Cost 0 to your hand.

name: The Infinaut
ability: If you played a card last turn, you can’t play this.

name: Vision
ability: You can move this each turn.

name: Vulture
ability: When this card moves, +5 Power.

name: Warpath
ability: Ongoing: If any of your locations are empty, +4 Power.
